name: Insurance Pools
description: Browse all insurance pools with grid/table view, search, and type filtering

screens.name: Pools Browser
screens.description: Grid/table view of all insurance pools from SurelyFactory. Supports search by name, filter by pool type (crypto/stablecoin/weather/flight), and view toggle (grid/table). Each pool card shows name, type badge, state badge, premium, maxPayout, policyholder count.

sections.title: Insurance Pools
sections.subtitle: Browse all active parametric insurance pools

states.name: Loading
states.description: Fetching pool addresses from SurelyFactory on-chain

elementDescriptions.Pool Grid: Skeleton cards shown while reading factory.getPoolAddresses()

elementDescriptions.Pool Cards: Each card: name, type badge (Crypto/Weather/Flight/Stablecoin), state badge (FUNDING green / ACTIVE blue / SETTLED grey), premium in CZUSD, maxPayout in CZUSD

elementDescriptions.Pool Grid: Shows subset matching all active filters

appFlows.name: Load insurance pools on-chain

steps.description: useAllPools() reads SurelyFactory.getPoolAddresses() — returns address[] of all deployed pools
PoolCardWrapper calls usePoolData(address) per pool — reads InsurancePool.getPoolData() returning OnChainPool struct
Pool cards rendered with name, type badge, state badge, premium/maxPayout in CZUSD, policyholder count

appFlows.outcome: User sees all deployed pools with live on-chain state

appFlows.name: Filter and search pools
appFlows.trigger: User types in search or selects filter

steps.description: Search input filters pool list client-side by pool name (case-insensitive)
Type filter narrows to crypto/stablecoin/weather/flight pools
State filter narrows to FUNDING/ACTIVE/SETTLED/EXPIRED pools

appFlows.outcome: Filtered subset of pools shown instantly without re-fetching
